description: 2x Partial Fibers Fault (Non-Service Impacting) bet Repeaters R5 & R6 from Fangshan. Suspected due to existing shunt degradation or new shunt #2
Partial Fiber Fault (Non-Service Impacting) between Korea to Japan. Fault still under investigation by Marine

1x Cable Fault (Service Impacting to Segs EF & DE Traffic) approx 207km between Pali Taiwan Landing Station to BU. NOTE: New Shunt Fault approx 196.7km from Taiwan CLS bet Repeaters RE002A & RE003A identified 17-Apr-2026
1x Cable Fault (Service Impacting) approx 1111.68km from Philippines CLS / 1475km from Singapore CLS bet Repeaters RS3-23 & RS3-24. Water depth TBD
1x Cable Fault (Service Impacting) between Hongkong to BU off Taiwan/Korea/Qingdao. NOTE: ETR delayed due to Vessel Thruster problem and repair in Singapore

1x Cable Fault (Service Impacting) approx 48.27km from Korea CLS bet 1st and 2nd Repeaters. Fault #2 Shunt on 04-Feb-2026 bet Repeaters RK005 & RK006A. NOTE: ETR delayed due to Taiwan Port customs documentation and vessel DG breakdown
1x Partial Fiber Fault (Service Impacting to 1x FP AB Traffic) due to Repeater's RA-007 LD failure
1x Cable Fault (Service Impacting) located approx 477km from Ajigaura CLS

1x Cable Fault FP13 (Service Impacting) between Hongkong and Singapore. Fault still under investigation. Note: S1i (SNI3990453, 18-Oct-2025) 2x Non-Service Impacting Shunt Faults also active approx 110km from HKG Station to BU4

1x Partial Fiber Fault FP2 (Non-Service Impacting) between Philippines and Guam. NOTE: FP2 Traffic resumed 20-Apr-2026 after AAG confirmed internal patching issue at Guam CLS - not related to wet fiber
